title: Linked List Cycle
description:
Given an array of node values and a `pos` index indicating where the tail connects back to (-1 means no cycle), determine if the linked list has a cycle.

Use Floyd's tortoise and hare algorithm: two pointers moving at different speeds.
hints: Floyd's cycle detection: use a slow pointer (1 step) and fast pointer (2 steps).
If there's a cycle, the fast pointer will eventually meet the slow pointer.
If the fast pointer reaches null, there's no cycle.
